title: BlockOS
description:
This modpack is a set of mods that do not depend on a host having them, in case you can use them on friends' servers (or any server you allow).

Mods such as:

Mini-Map
Bedrock-style bridge construction
Chest Tracker
More animations
Performance mods
body:
## ⚡ Your Game. Anywhere.

> A lightweight client-side modpack built to enhance your Minecraft experience on any server — no installation required.
> 
> Smooth performance, useful features, and a clean vanilla feel.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d318bda989b3193c3a10b2185a77ce98f0a8ab66_0.webp)

# 🧭 Xaero’s Map

_Minimap and full world map for easy navigation and exploration. Never get lost again._

![Xaero's Minimap](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/215fa1e0176a31b961487cd3eb7a9f8a738f1b87.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d318bda989b3193c3a10b2185a77ce98f0a8ab66_0.webp)

# 🧠 Jade

_Displays useful information about blocks and entities directly on your screen._

![Jade 0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/54ad52fa5cd8ab54f6c4e5d8b488a306d1bbeeb2_0.webp)

![Jade 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d1f483651148e70d1a0f1e325e67c150ad108c40.png)

![Jade 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3fc26651ebeeec990372d8ffb3b25ac307f7e52b.webp)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10ed2fd017947593075bc3ad77784d5bcd0a1260_0.webp)

# 📦 Chest Tracker

_Keep track of opened chests and stored items across your world._

![Chest Tracker 0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3037bb381e514f6dd026a8da2fb6cf6f29c810d1.png)

![Chest Tracker 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55a7213f0c21baef38894ec9ce31c0e358a93eea.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d318bda989b3193c3a10b2185a77ce98f0a8ab66_0.webp)

# 🌫️ Fog Control

_Customize or remove fog for better visibility and a cleaner view of the world._

![Simple Fog Control](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a0b497678cf38cec1889265d571d0fb5422319c.jpeg)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d318bda989b3193c3a10b2185a77ce98f0a8ab66_0.webp)

# 🏗️ Bridging Mod

_Helps with precise block placement, making bridging smoother and easier._

![Bridging](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e1ebc39fdc7d6659eec0cb6a19f3d3c239e28b3_0.webp)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d318bda989b3193c3a10b2185a77ce98f0a8ab66_0.webp)

# 🎒 Inventory HUD+

_Displays your inventory on screen for faster access and better awareness._

![Inventory HUD +](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e34b275e7e212b656987a1555cc4cf5af18db9f3.webp)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d318bda989b3193c3a10b2185a77ce98f0a8ab66_0.webp)

🧩 Inventory Profiles Next

_Advanced inventory sorting, auto-refill, and smart management tools._

![Inventory Profiles Next](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2498cb97cda6240a6beed7a0ebeb5f369f807dec.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d318bda989b3193c3a10b2185a77ce98f0a8ab66_0.webp)

# ⚡ Performance Boost

_A collection of optimization mods that drastically improve FPS and reduce lag._

- Faster rendering
- Better memory usage
- Smoother gameplay

![+FPS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cfc7bf05e893efc47fe674456e923ef099204aa2_0.webp)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d318bda989b3193c3a10b2185a77ce98f0a8ab66_0.webp)
